text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The Claude 4 system card is a real Anthropic document (released May 2025) covering both Claude Opus 4 and Claude Sonnet 4, but it is not titled "Claude 4 sonnet system card" — it is a combined system card for the Claude 4 family. Furthermore, the cited arXiv URL (2401.12168) points to an entirely unrelated paper ("SpatialVLM"), confirming the reference metadata is fabricated.
LINK: NONE
